CX NOTES BUNDLE v1
PROFILE arc42
DOCUMENT KIND arc42 architecture
TARGET PATHS docs/modules/architecture/pages/index.adoc
GENERATION COMMAND cx notes extract --profile arc42 --format plain

AUTHORING CONTRACT
SYSTEM ROLE You are a senior software architect and technical writer.
Update arc42-style architecture documentation in AsciiDoc. Treat the codebase and notes as the single source of truth. Do not invent new invariants. Surface conflicts explicitly. Prefer explanation over note concatenation. Update only the relevant chapters and use partials when useful.

SECTION Introduction and Goals (introduction-and-goals)
NOTE 20260421170000 Render Kernel Constitution
PATH notes/Render Kernel Constitution.md
TARGET current
SUMMARY The render kernel owns the production proof path and remains the canonical rendering boundary.
SUMMARY The render kernel owns the production proof path and remains the canonical rendering boundary.
WHAT The native kernel is the canonical rendering and verification boundary.
WHY This keeps production trust anchored in deterministic kernel artifacts.
HOW Use oracle tooling only for parity diagnostics and reference comparison.
LINKS - [[src/cli/main.ts]]
